raw_response: {"file_type": "technical_documentation", "line_count": 587, "functions": [], "classes": [], "imports": [], "complexity_notes": "This is a comprehensive technical architecture document for CollabSync, a real-time collaboration platform. It describes a complex distributed system with CRDT-based conflict resolution, multi-region active-active deployment, WebSocket-based real-time communication, and sophisticated infrastructure including Kubernetes, PostgreSQL, Redis, S3, and Apache Pulsar. The document covers system topology, data models, algorithms (RGA/LSEQ CRDT), API design, authentication, infrastructure configuration, performance benchmarks, disaster recovery, and monitoring/observability. Key complexity areas include: 1) CRDT merge algorithm with Lamport clocks for causal consistency, 2) Multi-AZ/multi-region active-active architecture with geo-replication, 3) WebSocket connection management with presence tracking, 4) Horizontal scaling strategy with consistent hashing for document sharding, 5) Comprehensive observability with RED metrics, distributed tracing, and structured logging, 6) Disaster recovery with sub-5-second RPO for region failures."}
